name: @intentsolutionsio/visual-regression-tester
description: Visual diff testing with Percy, Chromatic, BackstopJS - catch unintended UI changes

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install visual-regression-tester\\n  or /plugin install visual-regression-tester@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
